get.summary: Case aggregate root. current_handler_role and is_locked are denormalized — maintained by trigger trg_case_sync_handler. Never write these directly. initiated_by_role is immutable after creation.

get.summary: Append-only event log. UPDATE and DELETE blocked by trigger trg_case_events_immutable. INV-1: INSERT blocked when case.status = CLOSED (trigger trg_case_events_no_closed). INV-2: chk_escalate_handler_differs enforces handler change on DECISION_ESCALATE. STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED is always STUDENT_VISIBLE (constraint). payload is JSONB — schema validated at application layer.

post.summary: Append-only event log. UPDATE and DELETE blocked by trigger trg_case_events_immutable. INV-1: INSERT blocked when case.status = CLOSED (trigger trg_case_events_no_closed). INV-2: chk_escalate_handler_differs enforces handler change on DECISION_ESCALATE. STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED is always STUDENT_VISIBLE (constraint). payload is JSONB — schema validated at application layer.

delete.summary: Append-only event log. UPDATE and DELETE blocked by trigger trg_case_events_immutable. INV-1: INSERT blocked when case.status = CLOSED (trigger trg_case_events_no_closed). INV-2: chk_escalate_handler_differs enforces handler change on DECISION_ESCALATE. STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED is always STUDENT_VISIBLE (constraint). payload is JSONB — schema validated at application layer.

patch.summary: Append-only event log. UPDATE and DELETE blocked by trigger trg_case_events_immutable. INV-1: INSERT blocked when case.status = CLOSED (trigger trg_case_events_no_closed). INV-2: chk_escalate_handler_differs enforces handler change on DECISION_ESCALATE. STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED is always STUDENT_VISIBLE (constraint). payload is JSONB — schema validated at application layer.

get.summary: TN-02: System-activity signals for deriving teacher_indicator. Written only by system (edge functions / triggers after DML on attendance, observations, teacher_journals). Never written by client directly. Edge function trg_evaluate_teacher_indicator runs after session window closes and updates teaching_schedules.teacher_indicator from PENDING_EVALUATION to HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on whether any log rows exist for that schedule.

post.summary: TN-02: System-activity signals for deriving teacher_indicator. Written only by system (edge functions / triggers after DML on attendance, observations, teacher_journals). Never written by client directly. Edge function trg_evaluate_teacher_indicator runs after session window closes and updates teaching_schedules.teacher_indicator from PENDING_EVALUATION to HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on whether any log rows exist for that schedule.

delete.summary: TN-02: System-activity signals for deriving teacher_indicator. Written only by system (edge functions / triggers after DML on attendance, observations, teacher_journals). Never written by client directly. Edge function trg_evaluate_teacher_indicator runs after session window closes and updates teaching_schedules.teacher_indicator from PENDING_EVALUATION to HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on whether any log rows exist for that schedule.

patch.summary: TN-02: System-activity signals for deriving teacher_indicator. Written only by system (edge functions / triggers after DML on attendance, observations, teacher_journals). Never written by client directly. Edge function trg_evaluate_teacher_indicator runs after session window closes and updates teaching_schedules.teacher_indicator from PENDING_EVALUATION to HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on whether any log rows exist for that schedule.

get.summary: Exception-based Kepsek dashboard. Three exception types: LOW_ATTENDANCE, STALE_CASE, TEACHER_ABSENT. Returns only anomalies — not full records.

get.summary: Exception-based observations. Visibility default: POSITIF→STUDENT_VISIBLE, NEGATIF→INTERNAL_SCHOOL. Visibility is immutable after creation (trigger: trg_observation_visibility_immutable). visibility_override_flag = TRUE triggers an audit log entry when NEGATIF is set STUDENT_VISIBLE.

post.summary: Exception-based observations. Visibility default: POSITIF→STUDENT_VISIBLE, NEGATIF→INTERNAL_SCHOOL. Visibility is immutable after creation (trigger: trg_observation_visibility_immutable). visibility_override_flag = TRUE triggers an audit log entry when NEGATIF is set STUDENT_VISIBLE.

delete.summary: Exception-based observations. Visibility default: POSITIF→STUDENT_VISIBLE, NEGATIF→INTERNAL_SCHOOL. Visibility is immutable after creation (trigger: trg_observation_visibility_immutable). visibility_override_flag = TRUE triggers an audit log entry when NEGATIF is set STUDENT_VISIBLE.

patch.summary: Exception-based observations. Visibility default: POSITIF→STUDENT_VISIBLE, NEGATIF→INTERNAL_SCHOOL. Visibility is immutable after creation (trigger: trg_observation_visibility_immutable). visibility_override_flag = TRUE triggers an audit log entry when NEGATIF is set STUDENT_VISIBLE.

get.summary: Recurring weekly schedule slot. bulk-import-schedules expands each row into concrete teaching_schedules rows for every date in the active academic_periods range matching day_of_week.

get.summary: Parent communication. TN-08: visibility is per-row UUID array, not role-based. RLS: auth.uid() = ANY(visible_to_user_ids). INV-4: INBOUND blocked when linked case is_locked (trigger trg_parent_msg_lock_check). CASE_LINKED messages generate a case_events row in same transaction.

post.summary: Parent communication. TN-08: visibility is per-row UUID array, not role-based. RLS: auth.uid() = ANY(visible_to_user_ids). INV-4: INBOUND blocked when linked case is_locked (trigger trg_parent_msg_lock_check). CASE_LINKED messages generate a case_events row in same transaction.

patch.summary: Parent communication. TN-08: visibility is per-row UUID array, not role-based. RLS: auth.uid() = ANY(visible_to_user_ids). INV-4: INBOUND blocked when linked case is_locked (trigger trg_parent_msg_lock_check). CASE_LINKED messages generate a case_events row in same transaction.

get.summary: Optional narrative for student-facing case view. Always STUDENT_VISIBLE. Authored by current_handler_role only. Generating a student_update also appends a STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED case_event in the same transaction. If no update exists for a case, client falls back to generic text keyed on case.status.

get.summary: Student attendance per session. Default: HADIR / AUTO_DETECTED. is_void = TRUE for sessions where meeting_status = GURU_TIDAK_HADIR. Records are never deleted — only voided.

get.summary: Full case event timeline with author metadata and student update content. Privacy filtering (PRIVATE events) must be applied at query time for non-KEPSEK roles.
One row = one teaching session. meeting_status and teacher_indicator are the two state fields for the session-level domain. teacher_indicator is server-computed (TN-02), never written by client.

get.summary: Category A offline sync payload for GURU. Returns next 7 days of schedules with enrolled students and current attendance. Service Worker queries this filtered by scheduled_teacher_id = current user. Substitute schedules are handled separately via v_offline_sync_manifest_substitute.
Private teacher journal. No shared read access. RLS policy: owner only (auth.uid() matches owner_user_id). Offline Category A: synced to teacher device, never exposed to other roles.

post.summary: Private teacher journal. No shared read access. RLS policy: owner only (auth.uid() matches owner_user_id). Offline Category A: synced to teacher device, never exposed to other roles.

delete.summary: Private teacher journal. No shared read access. RLS policy: owner only (auth.uid() matches owner_user_id). Offline Category A: synced to teacher device, never exposed to other roles.

get.summary: Called by bulk-import-parents to batch-check NIK duplicates before provisioning ORTU accounts.

schema.description: Called by bulk-import-parents to batch-check NIK duplicates before provisioning ORTU accounts.

post.summary: Called by bulk-import-parents to batch-check NIK duplicates before provisioning ORTU accounts.

schema.description: Atomic transaction for opening a new academic year: updates school_config, inserts academic_periods, closes old class_enrollments, and inserts new class_enrollments for promoted students. Replaces the 4-step sequential writes previously done client-side in onConfirmNewYear().

post.summary: Atomic transaction for opening a new academic year: updates school_config, inserts academic_periods, closes old class_enrollments, and inserts new class_enrollments for promoted students. Replaces the 4-step sequential writes previously done client-side in onConfirmNewYear().

schema.description: TN-02: Called by scheduled Edge Function at end of school day. Resolves PENDING_EVALUATION → HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on teacher_attendance_log activity signals. Returns resolved rows for logging.

post.summary: TN-02: Called by scheduled Edge Function at end of school day. Resolves PENDING_EVALUATION → HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on teacher_attendance_log activity signals. Returns resolved rows for logging.

schema.description: Called exclusively by bulk-import-students Edge Function. Per-row atomic insert (students + class_enrollments) with partial-batch success.

post.summary: Called exclusively by bulk-import-students Edge Function. Per-row atomic insert (students + class_enrollments) with partial-batch success.

get.summary: Pre-auth lookup: login_identifier -> email, for the admin login form. Returns only email — never other user columns.

schema.description: Pre-auth lookup: login_identifier -> email, for the admin login form. Returns only email — never other user columns.

post.summary: Pre-auth lookup: login_identifier -> email, for the admin login form. Returns only email — never other user columns.

schema.description: Called exclusively by sync-attendance-batch Edge Function. SECURITY DEFINER — all permission checks done in Edge Function before calling. Atomically: upserts attendance, updates meeting_status, signals teacher indicator, records idempotency key.

post.summary: Called exclusively by sync-attendance-batch Edge Function. SECURITY DEFINER — all permission checks done in Edge Function before calling. Atomically: upserts attendance, updates meeting_status, signals teacher indicator, records idempotency key.

schema.description: Called exclusively by bulk-import-schedules Edge Function. Per-row insert with same-teacher time-overlap conflict detection.

post.summary: Called exclusively by bulk-import-schedules Edge Function. Per-row insert with same-teacher time-overlap conflict detection.

get.summary: TRUE if p_date falls inside an academic_periods row with status = CLOSED. Used by period-lock triggers on attendance/observations/teacher_journals.

cases.description: Case aggregate root. current_handler_role and is_locked are denormalized — maintained by trigger trg_case_sync_handler. Never write these directly. initiated_by_role is immutable after creation.

case_id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

student_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `students.student_id`.<fk table='students' column='student_id'/>

created_by_user_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `users.user_id`.<fk table='users' column='user_id'/>

current_handler_role.description: TN-04: Denormalized from last DECISION_ESCALATE or FINAL_DECISION_MADE event. Maintained by trigger. INV-3: must be non-null while status != CLOSED.

is_locked.description: TN-04: Denormalized from last CASE_LOCKED/CASE_UNLOCKED event. INV-4: when TRUE, COMMENT_ADDED blocked for non-current-handler.

locked_by_user_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `users.user_id`.<fk table='users' column='user_id'/>

closed_by_user_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `users.user_id`.<fk table='users' column='user_id'/>

case_events.description: Append-only event log. UPDATE and DELETE blocked by trigger trg_case_events_immutable. INV-1: INSERT blocked when case.status = CLOSED (trigger trg_case_events_no_closed). INV-2: chk_escalate_handler_differs enforces handler change on DECISION_ESCALATE. STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED is always STUDENT_VISIBLE (constraint). payload is JSONB — schema validated at application layer.

event_id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

case_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `cases.case_id`.<fk table='cases' column='case_id'/>

author_user_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `users.user_id`.<fk table='users' column='user_id'/>

parent_message_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `parent_messages.message_id`.<fk table='parent_messages' column='message_id'/>

teacher_attendance_log.description: TN-02: System-activity signals for deriving teacher_indicator. Written only by system (edge functions / triggers after DML on attendance, observations, teacher_journals). Never written by client directly. Edge function trg_evaluate_teacher_indicator runs after session window closes and updates teaching_schedules.teacher_indicator from PENDING_EVALUATION to HADIR or TIDAK_HADIR based on whether any log rows exist for that schedule.

log_id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

schedule_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `teaching_schedules.schedule_id`.<fk table='teaching_schedules' column='schedule_id'/>

user_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `users.user_id`.<fk table='users' column='user_id'/>

v_kepsek_exception_dashboard.description: Exception-based Kepsek dashboard. Three exception types: LOW_ATTENDANCE, STALE_CASE, TEACHER_ABSENT. Returns only anomalies — not full records.

teaching_assignments.description: Relasi guru-kelas-mapel per semester. Only GURU users. Used for attendance authorization and case visibility († condition).

assignment_id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

user_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `users.user_id`.<fk table='users' column='user_id'/>

Note:

subject_id.description:
Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `subjects.subject_id`.<fk table='subjects' column='subject_id'/>

observations.description: Exception-based observations. Visibility default: POSITIF→STUDENT_VISIBLE, NEGATIF→INTERNAL_SCHOOL. Visibility is immutable after creation (trigger: trg_observation_visibility_immutable). visibility_override_flag = TRUE triggers an audit log entry when NEGATIF is set STUDENT_VISIBLE.

observation_id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

schedule_templates.description: Recurring weekly schedule slot. bulk-import-schedules expands each row into concrete teaching_schedules rows for every date in the active academic_periods range matching day_of_week.

template_id.description:
Note:

parent_messages.description: Parent communication. TN-08: visibility is per-row UUID array, not role-based. RLS: auth.uid() = ANY(visible_to_user_ids). INV-4: INBOUND blocked when linked case is_locked (trigger trg_parent_msg_lock_check). CASE_LINKED messages generate a case_events row in same transaction.

programs.description: Seed: 10 common SMK programs. Review and adjust before first deploy. Add/remove programs via KEPSEK admin UI after initial seed.

program_id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

student_updates.description: Optional narrative for student-facing case view. Always STUDENT_VISIBLE. Authored by current_handler_role only. Generating a student_update also appends a STUDENT_UPDATE_ADDED case_event in the same transaction. If no update exists for a case, client falls back to generic text keyed on case.status.

attendance.description: Student attendance per session. Default: HADIR / AUTO_DETECTED. is_void = TRUE for sessions where meeting_status = GURU_TIDAK_HADIR. Records are never deleted — only voided.
